channel.title: Solved C programming exercises (step by step) :: C en rigle.dev
channel.description: Solved C programming exercises with clear explanations and compilable code on pointers, linked lists, recursion, dynamic memory, and file handling.

item.title: C vs Rust vs C++ vs C#: practical comparison to choose in 2026
item.description: Clear comparison of C, Rust, C++, and C# by performance, memory safety, learning curve, and real-world project fit.

item.title: Sequential programming in C: solved exercises from scratch
item.description: Solved sequential programming exercises in C using input, processing, and output for complete beginners.

item.title: Inheritance in C: solved exercise with composition and pointers
item.description: Solved inheritance-style exercise in C using composition and function pointers to simulate polymorphic behavior.

item.title: Online C compiler: 7 options to practice C without installing anything
item.description: Practical guide to choose an online C compiler based on your goal: solved practice, quick snippets, or technical interview prep.

item.title: Classes in C with struct: solved modular design exercise
item.description: Solved exercise to simulate classes in C with struct and functions, separating header interface and source implementation.

item.title: Data types in C: solved exercise with sizeof and casts
item.description: Solved C data types exercise using sizeof and explicit casts to prevent common mistakes.

item.title: Arrays and vectors in C: solved beginner exercises
item.description: Solved array and vector exercises in C with safe input, sum, max value, and conditional counting.

item.title: memset in C: solved exercise to initialize arrays and buffers
item.description: Solved memset exercise in C to initialize memory correctly and safely.

item.title: If else in C: solved exercises with nested conditions
item.description: Solved if else exercises in C covering simple conditions, nested branches, and logical operators.

item.title: malloc and realloc in C: solved dynamic array exercise
item.description: Solved malloc and realloc exercise in C to build a growing dynamic integer array.

item.title: While and do while in C: solved exercises
item.description: Solved while and do while exercises in C with input validation, digit counting, and condition-driven loops.

item.title: For loop in C: solved exercises with accumulators and counters
item.description: Solved for-loop exercises in C covering accumulators, counters, maximum value, and average calculation.

item.title: Is learning C worth it in 2026? Practical decision guide
item.description: Useful guide to decide whether learning C in 2026 is worth it based on real career paths, technical ROI, and a practical study plan.

item.title: Binary insertion sort in C: solved sorting exercise
item.description: Solved binary insertion sort exercise in C using binary search for insertion position and linear shifts.

item.title: Best books to learn C in 2026: comparison by level and learning style
item.description: Useful comparison of classic and modern C books in 2026 by level, exercises, practical focus, and recommended learning path.

item.title: Insertion sort in C: solved exercise
item.description: Solved insertion sort exercise in C with step-by-step logic, complexity analysis, and common mistakes.

item.title: Shell sort in C: solved exercise step by step
item.description: Solved shell sort exercise in C with gap sequence, complete implementation, and practical comparison with insertion sort.

item.title: Circular linked list in C: solved insert and traversal exercise
item.description: Solved circular linked list exercise in C with tail insertion, safe traversal, and memory cleanup.

item.title: Merge sort in C: solved exercise with divide and conquer
item.description: Merge sort method in C explained step by step with strategy, pseudocode, full solution, and O(n log n) complexity.

item.title: Binary tree in C: solved insertion and search exercise
item.description: Solved binary search tree exercise in C with node insertion and recursive search.

item.title: fread and fwrite in C: solved binary file exercise
item.description: Solved binary file exercise in C using fwrite and fread to persist and restore integer arrays.

item.title: Struct in C: solved exercise with arrays of structs
item.description: Solved struct exercise in C to model student records and compute averages with struct arrays.

item.title: Strings in C: solved exercises with strlen, strcpy, and strcmp
item.description: Solved strings exercise in C using strlen, strcpy, and strcmp for comparison, copy, and validation.

item.title: Pointer to pointer in C: solved exercise with reference update
item.description: Solved pointer-to-pointer exercise in C to safely update addresses from inside a function.

item.title: Malloc and free in C: solved dynamic memory exercise
item.description: Solved dynamic memory exercise in C with malloc checks, realloc resizing, and safe free cleanup.

item.title: Quicksort in C: solved exercise with Lomuto partition
item.description: Solved quicksort exercise in C using Lomuto partition to sort arrays efficiently.

item.title: Bubble sort in C: solved exercise step by step
item.description: Solved bubble sort exercise in C with comparisons, swaps, and early-exit optimization.

item.title: Binary search in C: solved exercise on sorted arrays
item.description: Solved binary search exercise in C to find target indices in sorted arrays with O(log n) complexity.

item.title: Queue in C: solved exercise with circular array
item.description: Solved queue exercise in C using a circular array with O(1) enqueue and dequeue operations.

item.title: Stack in C: solved exercise with push, pop, and peek
item.description: Solved stack exercise in C with push, pop, and peek on a fixed array, including overflow/underflow checks.

item.title: Singly linked list in C: solved exercise with insert and delete
item.description: Solved singly linked list exercise in C with head insertion, value search, and node deletion.

item.title: Doubly linked list in C: solved exercise with insert and traversal
item.description: Learn doubly linked list in C with a solved exercise: append, forward/backward traversal, and leak-free memory cleanup.

item.title: Files in C: solved exercise to count lines and characters
item.description: Solved files-in-C exercise using fopen and fgetc to count lines and characters with proper error handling.

item.title: Matrices in C: solved main and secondary diagonal exercise
item.description: Solved matrices exercise in C to compute main and secondary diagonal sums in square matrices.

item.title: Pointers in C: solved pass-by-reference exercises
item.description: Solved pointers exercise in C to master pass-by-reference, variable swap, and common pointer mistakes.

item.title: Recursion in C: solved exercise to reverse a string
item.description: Solved recursion exercise in C to reverse strings, understand base case flow, and avoid common recursion mistakes.
